chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD CP No. S- 975 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 28.03.2016 For Katcha Peshi None present for petitioner Mr. Sher M. Leghari State counsel The application of applicant namely Muhammad Ramzan dated 19.12.2014 complaining against police officials of District Hyderabad was converted into petition and notices were issued to the respondents. Learned state Counsel has filed comments stating therein that against the nephew of petitioner namely Allah Bux Mallah many criminal cases have been registered. He further states that the petitioner has not been harassed and the allegations levelled by him against the police officials are false. Record reflects that despite service of notice the petitioner has never appeared before this court. In the circumstances, as well as on the statement learned State Counsel that no harassment is caused to the petitioner, this petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE *Karar/-
